scripts.loop:version: node -e "const s=require('./package.json').scripts['loop:stable']; const m=s.match(/@loop-kit\/loop-cli@([^\s\"]+)/); if(!m){console.error('Unable to parse loop:stable pin'); process.exit(1);} console.log(m[0]);"
scripts.release:publish:all:env: proto run dotenvx -- run --env-file .env.release -- node tools/automation/dagger-from-env.mjs publish-all
scripts.release:publish:cli:env: proto run dotenvx -- run --env-file .env.release -- node tools/automation/dagger-from-env.mjs publish-cli
scripts.nitric:registry:spec:env: proto run dotenvx -- run --env-file examples/nitric/loop-registry/.env.registry -- node tools/automation/dagger-from-env.mjs registry-spec
scripts.nitric:registry:build:env: proto run dotenvx -- run --env-file examples/nitric/loop-registry/.env.registry -- node tools/automation/dagger-from-env.mjs registry-build
scripts.nitric:registry:deploy:env: proto run dotenvx -- run --env-file examples/nitric/loop-registry/.env.registry -- node tools/automation/dagger-from-env.mjs registry-deploy
